onBindViewHolder(NotificationAdapter.NotificationViewHolder, int) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.NotificationAdapter
 
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.AdminBrowseEventsActivity
This method loads the UI, initializes the firebase and event repository instances, and connects the java variables to the views in the XML
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.AdminEventDetailsActivity
This method deals with the creation of the event details screen and its component views as well as initializing and getting all the necessary information for that screen,
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.AdminZoneActivity
This method sets up the UI and button navigations
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.AllEntrantsActivity
This is the creation of the Activity This connects to layout for the screen and connects the clickable view to their controller
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.AuthMenuActivity
This is the creation of the Activity This connects to layout for the screen and connects the clickable view to their controller
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.CreateEventActivity
This is the creation of the Activity This connects to views for the screen and connects the clickable view to their controller Has an additional boolean edit mode that immediately loadEventForEditing() if there already is a event creation in progress
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EntrantsActivity
This is the creation of the Activity This connects to layout for the screen and connects the clickable view to their controller
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.HomeActivity
This is the creation of the Activity This connects to all the view on the screen and connects the clickable view to their controller
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.HostedEventsActivity
This is the creation of the Activity This connects to all the view on the screen and connects the clickable view to their controller
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.LoginActivity
This is the creation of the Activity This connects to all the view on the screen and connects the clickable views to their controller
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.MainActivity
This opens the AuthMenuActivity if the user is not recognized If the user is recognized opens HomeActivity
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.MyThingsActivity
This is the creation of the Activity This connects to layout for the screen and connects the clickable view to their controller It also sets up notifications to be received
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.MyWaitlistActivity
This connects to all the view on the screen and connects the clickable view to the controller also creates a connection to the database
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.ProfileRemovedActivity
This is the creation of the Activity This connect to the view on the screen and connects button to its controller
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.QRCode
 
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.SettingsActivity
This is the creation of the Activity This connects to all the view on the screen and connects the clickable views to their controller
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.SignupActivity
This is the creation of the Activity This connects to all the view on the screen and connects the clickable views to their controller
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.UserProfileDetailsActivity
This method deals with the creation of the user profile details screen and its component views as well as initializing and getting all the necessary information for that screen,
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.UserProfilesActivity
This method loads the UI, initializes the firebase and event repository instances, and connects the java variables to the views in the XML
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.ViewEventActivity
This is the creation of the Activity This connects to all the view on the screen and connects the clickable view to their controller sets screenTitleTextView, editEventButton to be invisible as it should not be displayed initially
onCreateViewHolder(ViewGroup, int) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.NotificationAdapter
 
onNotificationClick(NotificationItem) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.MyThingsActivity
This is the controller that is run when a notification is clicked by the User it runs a method that gives the user a popup of notification content depending on type of notification
onNotificationClick(NotificationItem) - Method in interface com.example.eventlotterysystem.NotificationAdapter.OnNotificationClickListener
Triggered when a notification is clicked.
onNotificationLongClick(NotificationItem) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.MyThingsActivity
This is the controller that is run when a notification click-held by the User creates a popup that allows the user to delete the notification
onNotificationLongClick(NotificationItem) - Method in interface com.example.eventlotterysystem.NotificationAdapter.OnNotificationClickListener
Triggered when a notification is long-clicked.
onResume() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.SettingsActivity
This when the Activity is resumed (is returned to) runs refreshVerifiedEmailIfNeeded to finish the process of changing emails
onStart() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.AdminBrowseEventsActivity
Essentially checks whether there is a signed in user, and to navigate to the AuthMenu if not, and check if the current user is an admin.
onStart() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.AdminEventDetailsActivity
This is the startup of the Activity This runs loadEvent to get all the Event information of the event that was selected to get to the activity_admin_event_details screen
onStart() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.AdminZoneActivity
This screen checks if the current user is an admin and is allowed to access this page
onStart() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.AllEntrantsActivity
This is the startup of the Activity runs loadEntrants
onStart() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.AuthMenuActivity
This is the startup of the Activity This connects to the firebase database and tries the current user if there is a current user runs navigateAndClearTask()
onStart() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EntrantsActivity
This is the startup of the Activity it loads the entrant aggregated information for the Event on a load failure notifies user with a popup
onStart() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.HomeActivity
This is the startup of the Activity This gets the current user from the database and runs verifyActiveProfileAndRender to get user data
onStart() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.HostedEventsActivity
This is the startup of the Activity get user from database and runs a load to get their created events
onStart() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.MyThingsActivity
This is the startup of the Activity it runs loads for account type and notifications for the user
onStart() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.MyWaitlistActivity
startup of the Activity get user from database and runs a load to get their waitlist
onStart() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.ProfileRemovedActivity
This is the startup of the Activity signs the user out if the deleted account
onStart() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.UserProfilesActivity
Essentially checks whether there is a signed in user, and to navigate to the AuthMenu if not, and check if the current user is an admin.
onStart() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.ViewEventActivity
This is the startup of the Activity This runs loadEvent to get all the Event information of the event that was selected to get to the activity_view_event screen
onStop() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.AdminBrowseEventsActivity
Removes event listeners in the event this function is called.
openedByAuthorTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.ViewEventActivityTest
tests to see that when opened through the organiser view allow navigation to edit the Event
